proof: function(x0: T, x1: T) { relation_power(r, Nat.zero, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(x, y)
function[T1](x0: Nat, x1: T1, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { Nat.zero != x0 or eq_relation[T1](x1, x2) = relation_power[T1](x3, x0, x1, x2) }[T](Nat.zero, x, y, r)

goal: u(x, y) = relation_compose(relation_power[T](r, n), r, x, y)
proof: function(x0: T, x1: T) { relation_power(r, n.suc, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(x, y)

function[T2](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: (T2, T2) -> Bool, x3: T2, x4: T2) { x0.suc != x1 or relation_compose[T2, T2, T2](relation_power[T2](x2, x0), x2, x3, x4) = relation_power[T2](x2, x1, x3, x4) }[T](n, n.suc, r, x, y)

goal: v(x, y) = relation_compose(relation_power[T](r, n), r, x, y)

proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { eq_relation[T0](x0, x1) = (x0 = x1) }[T](x, x)
function[T1](x0: Nat, x1: T1, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { Nat.zero != x0 or eq_relation[T1](x1, x2) = relation_power[T1](x3, x0, x1, x2) }[T](Nat.zero, x, x, r)
relation_compose(relation_power[T](r, Nat.zero), r, x, y)
function[T2](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: (T2, T2) -> Bool) { x0.suc != x1 or relation_compose[T2, T2, T2](relation_power[T2](x2, x0), x2) = relation_power[T2](x2, x1) }[T](Nat.zero, Nat.zero.suc, r)

proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { exists(k0: Nat) { relation_power[T0](x0, k0, x1, x2) } = relation_refl_trans_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](r, x, y)

proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { exists(k0: Nat) { relation_power[T0](x0, k0.suc, x1, x2) } = relation_trans_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](r, x, y)
not exists(k0: Nat) { relation_power(r, k0.suc, x, y) }
function(x0: Nat) { not relation_power(r, x0.suc, x, y) }(n)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, T](r, relation_refl_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { r(w0, k0) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) } }
let w1: T satisfy { r(w0, w1) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { not r(x0, x1) or relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) }(w0, w1)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1, x1) } = is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[T](relation_refl_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w0) }
function(x0: T) { relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x0, x0) }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, T](r, relation_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { r(w0, k0) and not relation_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) } }
let w1: T satisfy { r(w0, w1) and not relation_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { not r(x0, x1) or relation_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) }(w0, w1)

proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Nat, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not relation_power[T0](x0, x1, x2, x3) or relation_refl_trans_closure[T0](x0, x2, x3) }[T](r, n.suc, x, y)

function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, T](relation_trans_closure[T](r), relation_refl_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { relation_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) } }
let w1: T satisfy { relation_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { not relation_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) or relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) }(w0, w1)
relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k)) = relation_power[T](r, m + k)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Nat) { relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](relation_power[T0](x0, x1), x0) = relation_power[T0](x0, x1.suc) }[T](r, k)

relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k)), r) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, k), r))
relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k)), r) != relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k.suc))
relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k)), r) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, k.suc))
relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m + k), r) != relation_power[T](r, (m + k).suc)
relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m + k), r) = relation_power[T](r, (m + k).suc)
function(x0: Nat) { relation_power[T](r, m + x0) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, x0)) = p(x0) }(Nat.zero)
function(x0: Nat) { relation_power[T](r, m + x0) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, x0)) = p(x0) }(k)
function(x0: Nat) { relation_power[T](r, m + x0) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, x0)) = p(x0) }(k.suc)
function(x0: Nat -> Bool) { not forall(x1: Nat) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.suc) } or not x0(Nat.zero) or forall(x2: Nat) { x0(x2) } = true }(p)
function(x0: Nat -> Bool, x1: Nat) { not forall(x2: Nat) { not x0(x2) or x0(x2.suc) } or not x0(Nat.zero) or x0(x1) }(p, n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { p(w0) and not p(w0.suc) }
function(x0: Nat) { not p(x0) or p(x0.suc) }(w0)
function(x0: Nat) { relation_power[T](r, m + x0) = relation_compose[T, T, T](relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, x0)) = p(x0) }(n)

goal: relation_compose(relation_power[T](r, m), relation_power[T](r, n), x, z)

proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[T](relation_refl_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T, k1: T) { relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) and relation_refl_trans_closure(r, k0, k1) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, k1) } }
let w1: T satisfy { exists(k2: T) { relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) and relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w1, k2) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, k2) } }
let w2: T satisfy { relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) and relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w1, w2) and not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, w0, w2) }
function(x0: T, x1: T, x2: T) { not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) or not relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x1, x2) or relation_refl_trans_closure(r, x0, x2) }(w0, w1, w2)

goal: relation_compose(relation_power[T](r, m.suc), relation_power[T](r, n.suc), x, z)

proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[T](relation_trans_closure[T](r))
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T, k1: T) { relation_trans_closure(r, w0, k0) and relation_trans_closure(r, k0, k1) and not relation_trans_closure(r, w0, k1) } }
let w1: T satisfy { exists(k2: T) { relation_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) and relation_trans_closure(r, w1, k2) and not relation_trans_closure(r, w0, k2) } }
let w2: T satisfy { relation_trans_closure(r, w0, w1) and relation_trans_closure(r, w1, w2) and not relation_trans_closure(r, w0, w2) }
function(x0: T, x1: T, x2: T) { not relation_trans_closure(r, x0, x1) or not relation_trans_closure(r, x1, x2) or relation_trans_closure(r, x0, x2) }(w0, w1, w2)
